ground_truth.title: AAA Vacations - Tour Packages
ground_truth.main_content:
Search AAA Vacations®
Exciting itineraries... Engaging experiences... Exclusive values...
Every vacation is highlighted with authentic experiences and great values to engage you more personally in the cultures and landscapes of the world. These vacations will take you to some of the most remarkable places in the world. You'll be amazed by all that is included in each vacation. Please click one of the below locations and start planning your next dream vacation!
All tour prices are subject to change. Please contact your AAA travel advisor for the most up-to-date pricing.

Preferred Tour suppliers participating in AAA Vacations®
Click or hover over any of these suppliers to see why AAA recommends them
AAA Exclusive Vacations
AAA Exclusive Vacations offers members curated vacations that feature America's iconic festivals and events. These tours have been crafted specifically for AAA Members.
Brendan Vacations
With over a half-century of Celtic experience, Brendan Vacations presents the wild and rich culture, history and landscapes of Ireland and Scotland. Enjoy a private chauffeur, locally hosted, guided or self-drive vacation. In a land known for ancient storytelling, write your own tale, or let Brendan customize an authentic experience just for you.
Pleasant Holidays
Custom vacations for romance, relaxation & adventure - whether you want to travel across the world or around the bend. Choose from five-star resorts and all-inclusive options to villas and fully equipped condominiums with the conveniences of home. Whether you want an adults only escape or a family-friendly getaway, Pleasant Holidays® can be anything you desire.
Trafalgar
A leader in providing immersive experiences for food lovers, history buffs, families and everyone in between, Trafalgar offers carefully crafted trips that present the rich diversity of the world, inspiring people to connect to the communities that bring travel destinations to life.
Alexander+Roberts
At the forefront of international travel, Alexander+Roberts crafts upscale journeys that include the finest accommodations, from luxury hotels and historic boutique properties to the best safari camps and small ships. Revel in extensive expertly guided tours, unique experiences you won't find anywhere else and congenial meals that reflect authentic regional flavors.
Insight Vacations
Insight Vacations specializes in guided departures led by well-experienced travel directors trained to deliver a stress-free journey with outstanding service and style.Choose from four types of smaller group trips and enjoy distinctive hotels, unique dining choices and deeper interactive experiences that are typically unavailable with independent travel.
Journese
Upgrade any custom vacation to luxury levels. JourneseSM embodies the promise of an exquisite journey, with fine travel made seamless and effortless through experienced destination specialists.
AAA Member Choice Vacations
From train journeys to learning vacations, from getaways to comprehensive multi-city tours, your choices at AAA Member Choice Vacations are endless. All AAA Member Choice Vacations departures are escorted by a full-time tour manager and include many unique activities that give you an authentic glimpse into the local culture.
Rocky Mountaineer
Rocky Mountaineer offers unique vacation packages and three distinctive rail routes through British Columbia and Alberta. Experience world-renowned, luxury train travel through the wild beauty of Canada's West and the majestic Canadian Rockies.
Club Adventures
Club Adventures offers members journeys that focus on off-the-beaten-path itineraries designed to provide authentic connections, boutique accommodations and exciting adventures with local guides who will show you around their neighborhood in a personal way.
African Travel
For over 40 years, African Travel, Inc. has created extraordinary, handcrafted, luxury safari experiences ensuring immersive and authentic cultural encounters across the continent. From South Africa to Egypt, African Travel, Inc. designs custom vacation packages around your unique interests, budget and travel style.
Luxury Gold
Luxury Gold delivers luxury travel to some of the world's most exciting destinations. Enjoy extraordinary escorted experiences and see places you've only dreamed of visiting. Your Luxury Gold journey will be perfectly planned, personalized and truly unforgettable.
Amtrak Vacations
With Amtrak Vacations, you can discover the most stunning destinations across the US and Canada by rail! Whether it's the small station closest to your hometown or a major station in one of your favorite cities, you can start and end your vacation where and when you want.
Railbookers
Offers an ever-expanding collection of independent rail holiday itineraries featuring sought-after destinations and experiences worldwide.
AAA Vacations® 24/7 Member Care
Available on all AAA Vacations® packages, 24/7 Member Care can provide assistance with reservation changes, flight mishaps, and other travel needs during your vacation. Member Care is provided by Allianz Global Assistance, AAA's preferred travel insurance provider.
Best Price Guaranteed!
When you make a booking with us...
If you book a qualifying AAA Vacations® cruise or tour package and find a valid better rate for the exact itinerary within 24 hours of your booking, AAA will match the lower rate and send you a $50 AAA Vacations® future travel credit certificate.
Certain restrictions apply. Please see AAA Vacations® Full Terms and Conditions.
AAA Vacations® Offers a Vacation Option That Fits Your Travel Style
Tour Types
Independent
If you like to set off on your own, these vacations are good for you. Travel on your own schedule with the option of customized itineraries, pre-arranged air, car, hotel and more.
Locally Hosted
Let a local host show you the way with assistance on sightseeing, dining recommendations, travel advice and delivery of pre-arranged travel components.
Guided
Choose from group or privately guided itineraries led by knowledgeable guides. You'll get a great education in the history and culture of your destination.
Ocean Cruise
We team up with the world's premier cruise lines to make your sailing dreams come true. Sail the world's great oceans while adventure and new experiences await you at every port of call.
River Cruise
AAA and our preferred river cruise providers offer you unforgettable journeys along the world's great rivers. Experience the sights, cultures and histories of these legendary waterways.
Contact a AAA Travel Agent Today!
Trust your AAA Travel Agent as your one-stop source for your next vacation. Travel with confidence knowing AAA Travel will be here for you before, during and after your vacation.
Find an Agent
